creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
status-reviewers
================

Should this be a subproject of docs? 

<https://reviews.freebsd.org/project/subprojects/72/>

The docs project is described as "People who are willing to review documentation changes (opt-in)". 

<https://secure.phabricator.com/book/phabricator/article/projects/#subprojects>

I assume that watching a subproject should be not as noisy as watching the larger project.
